evolving_demo_message:
Welcome to Logistik Demo!

This demo is evolving and represents a limited version and a work-in-progress of what the game will be at its release. You'll see multiple updates as development progresses. These updates will allow me to test new features, fix bugs, and improve player experience.

Feel free to report any issues or share feedback on Discord, on the Steam Forums or in Itch.io comments for this demo. I can't promise I will fix everything immediately, but it will definitely be read, addressed and potentially added to my Roadmap :)

Here's a lists of the major features and their status (not in a specific order):
- [X] Railway management
- [X] Train planning
- [X] Quests system
- [X] Basic map editor
- [ ] Advanced map editor (easier to use, more map elements such as mountains, cities, lakes, oceans, ...)
- [ ] Vehicles management (buying/renting them)
- [ ] Freight/Passenger management (with offer/demand)
- [ ] Advanced Signal managment (crossroads, railroad from/to another railroad, ...)
- [ ] More quests types
- [ ] More gamemodes (endless, challenges with leaderboards)
- And a lot more things in the Roadmap :)

Enjoy the game,
Axel "Elanis"
new-game-map-type-available-soon: Work in progress. Will be available soon!
